heading: Failure to comply with information reporting requirements relating to qualified opportunity funds and qualified rural opportunity funds
label: 6726 Failure to comply with information reporting requirements relating to qualified opportunity funds and qualified rural opportunity funds
notes: Effective DateSection applicable to taxable years beginning after , see , set out as an Effective Date of 2025 Amendment note under .July 4, 2025section 70421(d)(5) of Pub. L. 119–21section 6011 of this title
amendments: Effective DateSection applicable to taxable years beginning after , see , set out as an Effective Date of 2025 Amendment note under .July 4, 2025section 70421(d)(5) of Pub. L. 119–21section 6011 of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: If any person required to file a return under section 6039K fails to file a complete and correct return under such section in the time and in the manner prescribed therefor, such person shall pay a penalty of $500 for each day during which such failure continues.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The maximum penalty under this section on failures with respect to any 1 return shall not exceed $10,000.

children.heading: Large qualified opportunity funds
children.label: 2 Large qualified opportunity funds
children.text: In the case of any failure described in subsection (a) with respect to a fund the gross assets of which (determined on the last day of the taxable year) are in excess of $10,000,000, paragraph (1) shall be applied by substituting “$50,000” for “$10,000”.

children.heading: Penalty in cases of intentional disregard
children.label: c Penalty in cases of intentional disregard

children.text: subsection (a) shall be applied by substituting “$2,500” for “$500”,
subsection (b)(1) shall be applied by substituting “$50,000” for “$10,000”, and
subsection (b)(2) shall be applied by substituting “$250,000” for “$50,000”.

children.label: B
children.text: the cost-of-living adjustment determined under section 1(f)(3) for the calendar year determined by substituting “calendar year 2024” for “calendar year 2016” in subparagraph (A)(ii) thereof.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: If the $500 dollar amount in subsection (a) and (c)(1) or the $2,500 amount in subsection (c)(1), after being increased under paragraph (1), is not a multiple of $10, such dollar amount shall be rounded to the next lowest multiple of $10.

children.heading: Asset threshold
children.label: B Asset threshold
children.text: If the $10,000,000 dollar amount in subsection (b)(2), after being increased under paragraph (1), is not a multiple of $10,000, such dollar amount shall be rounded to the next lowest multiple of $10,000.

children.heading: Other dollar amounts
children.label: C Other dollar amounts
children.text: If any dollar amount in subsection (b) or (c) (other than any amount to which subparagraph (A) or (B) applies), after being increased under paragraph (1), is not a multiple of $1,000, such dollar amount shall be rounded to the next lowest multiple of $1,000.
